creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear Hiroki-san,

please add an UPDATING entry for the recent texlive-base update. Thank you.

When installing from ports with the predecessor version installed, the installation fails because kpsewhere moved into a separate package:

===>   texlive-base-20140525_4 depends on shared library: libzzip.so - found (/usr/local/lib/libzzip.so.13.0.62)
===>   texlive-base-20140525_4 depends on shared library: libpoppler.so - found (/usr/local/lib/libpoppler.so.46.0.0)
===>   texlive-base-20140525_4 depends on shared library: libkpathsea.so - not found
===>    Verifying for libkpathsea.so in /usr/ports/devel/tex-kpathsea
===>  Installing for tex-kpathsea-6.2.0_1
===>   tex-kpathsea-6.2.0_1 depends on executable: indexinfo - found
===>  Checking if tex-kpathsea already installed
===>  Switching to root credentials for 'install' target
===>   Registering installation for tex-kpathsea-6.2.0_1
Installing tex-kpathsea-6.2.0_1...
pkg-static: tex-kpathsea-6.2.0_1 conflicts with texlive-base-20140525_3 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/kpsewhere
*** [fake-pkg] Error code 70

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/tex-kpathsea.
*** [/var/tmp/usr/ports/devel/tex-kpathsea/work/.install_done.kpathsea._usr_local] Error code 1
